case_title: THE TIDES CENTER, VS. MARC JONES et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, MARC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 124 TURK STREET, #307, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE: LOSS OF ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION SERVED OCT-21-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MARC
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MARC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MARC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION SERVED OCT-21-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $14.16 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE TIDES CENTER, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT PUBLIC BENEFIT CORPORATION
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MARC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MARC
